description: This software meets our necessities. Our company is fanned out across the UAE and this permits us to follow the proprietors of every resource alongside planning their areas the nation over. Helpful "Receiving" and "Issuing" highlights function admirably for resources that much of the time change hands.
author: Alwin N.
pros: Ease to Use and understand Inventory Management is very accurate Asset Management is easily handled User Interface is simple and easy to understand. Traceability is very good.
cons: Few Missing Features are there. Challenges in Usage for first time beginner Some Confusion at the initial stage
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use, search needs minor improvements
author: Nick B.
pros: The application is easy to navigate and use. Keeping track of inventory is made simpler. The location feature makes looking for new areas to reach easier.
cons: The search feature can be a bit clunky and exhaustive. The items have images in the search bar but I can't see them in the search results unless I open up that asset. It should be there in the search results as well.

review_title: EZOfficeInventory is a game-changer for keeping track of office equipment and inventory. It’s made my job so much easier!
author: Javier F.
pros: I love how easy it is to check in and check out equipment, and the mobile app is super handy for on-the-go access.
cons: The report customization options are a bit limited, and I wish there were more integrations available with other software we use.

description: The overall experience with the product is positive. We have used this product in our organization for the last year and have an impressive user experience. The company addresses user feedback and adds features as requested. Their field agents are also friendly and supportive.
author: Alok B.
pros: The multi-type asset tracking feature is my favorite as it doesn't restrict us to 1 or a few methods to track assets. Also, the Customer Reporting and analytics feature adds much value to the platform for the users.
cons: Customer Support can improve. It should provide 24X7 CS for the customers.

description: Experience has been great and helped me to stay organized with school technology.
author: Teana R.
pros: The organization of the website and the easiness to find device information.
cons: Checking Devices in and out. Assigning chrome books to teachers.

review_title: EZOfficeInventory makes tracking our office equipment a breeze!
author: Angel F.
pros: The software is intuitive and keeps everything organized. It's easy to use and saves us time.
cons: The reporting features could use some improvement, and it would be helpful to have more customization options.

description: It's easy to navigate and fill-up; no difficulties encountered along the way.
author: John Philip E.
pros: They are up to date in tracking borrowed assets and well-organized as well
cons: So far, I haven't encountered any issue with EZOfficeInventory yet. So, none.

author: Chaya H.
pros: Made it so easy to know what materials were available. I could even reserve in advance to make sure I have what I need for work!
cons: Can be a bit difficult to search with similar materials.

description: I got to use this to implement a whole inventory system for a painting company. It was a great experience for me, the company president, and the crew. Knowing what you have and what you need saves so much time and helps you save resources.
author: Samantha J.
pros: I love the different options and versatility for each product type you can really keep track of everything from expenses to quantities, it keeps things super efficient in our business!
cons: Nothing really I even enjoyed the training

description: I think they are phenomenal with the inventory and all of the equipment are really well provided
author: Donnathan C.
pros: They have many high quality equipments and are very usable
cons: Is that the guide is very well provided with mostly me having to figure it out on my own
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I like it, it is so fast and easy to use
author: Debinson C.
pros: Fast, easy to use, general goods point and so funny during daily work
cons: At moment I don't have any negative comments
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Why should we use EZ-Inventory and Why not
description: It overall good, As we are using it from last 3-4 years and we are very well satisfied with EZ services, afterall it helps us to manage our overall org inventory system.
author: John R.
pros: Pros as per me :- 1. Easy to manage all the assets inventory. 2. Option to upload bulk assets inventory from excel sheet, It save hell lot of time. 3. You are many option of pulling out reports and thier custom report pulling feature is option , it has multiple options to cover in your excel sheet which you want to export. 4. User friendly UI
cons: There are 2 cons :- 1. There is no option to create a parent state, I don;t know I have to create a parent substate as "decommisioned"but I was not able to do so, Then I have to create a custom substate under "Retired" section. 2. Reports dashboard should is not easy to understand, I took session from the ez team but they also not able to create that such type of report dashboard.

description: We had difficulty maintaining an accurate inventory of IT assets so annual inventory processes were very manual and difficult to find items, especially with the increase of remote workers after COVID. Now everyone can respond to an inventory audit from wherever they are located on their own to acknowledge possession of the assets they have.
author: Shannon N.
pros: I like the ability to assign assets to individual users to give them a sense of accountability. They perform their own audit responses and maintain their own location changes making it easier on back office functions. I also like the reporting functions both in the built-in reports as well as the custom reports that cater to the organization's needs.
cons: One problem we have had consistently over the years is that we have some 3000+ assets in the system but when we do the annual inventory, we cannot request the audit for our entire list of inventory at one time. We can only request the audit 25 lines at a time so that is time consuming.

review_title: It's good to know what we have and where it is !!
description: Although not very cheap we decided to have the full version after using the trial, the cost could be offset by one item not getting lost or several not being abused as they could be
author: Dean S.
pros: We really like knowing where items are, where they have been, and who has used them, it not only reduces losses but we also believe it reduces abuse of items as staff know they have to return an item and need to return it in good condition
cons: Sometimes the capture of the barcode is difficult but that could be user error, overcome by manual searching

description: My personal experience has been great. When speaking with potential clients, if they have certain preferences on equipment needs, I can easy access our inventory to see off we have that particular equipment instantly. It is just very easy to use. It's not clunky in any way.
author: Duane K.
pros: It's very user friendly software. Before selecting it, we looked at one other software. What we loved about it was the ability to customize it without having to call support for help. We are able to track all of our inventory via barcode no matter what project they are assigned to with ease, via online or mobile app.
cons: As soon as I have an answer I will update. We are very pleased with the software.

author: Emily G.
pros: Extremely user friendly and very efficient!
cons: Honestly I’m not sure I have an opinion on this.

review_title: Great but would want more details
description: It was overall great and very easy to use after learning how to use it.
author: Eduardo Q.
pros: It was very efficient and very understanding for the quickness I needed the gear and delivered for well.
cons: The gear I checked out (black magic) did not describe the additional contents of the package, like batteries, no lense, etc. So kr was hard to figure out what I needed to get overall.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Effective tool for asset management despite a learning curve with its interface.
author: Jacob A.
pros: Comprehensive asset tracking features that streamline inventory management and enhance organization.
cons: The user interface can be unintuitive and challenging for new users.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: easy use. up to date info, helped me find exactly what I was looking for
author: Daniel L.
pros: easy to access and see the inventory. can figure out how to navigate quickly
cons: not much. like all new programs had to navigate a bit to figure out
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It’s easy for me to update the inventory, scan the code and provide the actual quality taken out of the inventory.
author: ABAYOMI T.
pros: Easy accessible and the QR code options.
cons: The app currently meets all my demands..
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I ENJOY THE EASE WITH WHICH TO ENTER INVENTORY AND THE UPLOADING OF THE PICTURES
author: ANN M.
pros: I LIKE THE EASE OF FINDING THE PRODUCTS I PUT IN THE SYSTEM AND HOW TO CATAGORIZE EACH ITEM
cons: THE SCANNING IT NEEDS TO BE MORE USER FRIENDLY AND THE TRACKING NEEDS TO BE IPROVED

author: Jay S.
pros: Easy to use and the layout is easy to understand.
cons: It would be nice if you could upload an image of the item that can be seen next to the name of the item. In case you can only identify what the item looks like when you don't know what it is called.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Highly recommend for big labs and companies
author: Gokhan C.
pros: Great for managing and checking the availability of the inventory rather than looking around
cons: The app version needs improvement on user interface.

description: This is the 1st time that I have used the application and I really like it
author: Michael G.
pros: Very simple to use . I use the mobile version to scan on the floor
cons: At this point there is not anything that Is not user friendly .
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Medium featured for a higher price
description: The platform is what it is and does what it does. I'm usually in constant contact with the vendor regarding feature enhancements and bug reporting, but I wish I didn't have to be. There are lots of features that are important to us, data that we need to see at specific times, customizations to the auto-generated emails, etc. that the vendor doesn't appear to be in a rush to implement. Really seems as though they didn't do market research on what end users need before developing the product. I also don't appreciate how the pricing works when adding additional assets. The price per asset seems to scale upward instead of downward as assets increase. Not sure why that is.
author: Matthew E.
pros: The tool does the basics, tracks assets and asset stock that is checked out to users.
cons: There seem to constantly be bugs, data not loading correctly, reports showing the incorrect results, website not loading properly. These are all reported and fixed but the fact that these things continue to happen, show that there isn't enough QA done before releasing features.
